mapper.select:
/* transferMapper.getRcpCustNotOpenList */
SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , A.SCAN_ID AS scanId , A.RES_NO AS resNo , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS reqInDay , CASE WHEN PSTATE = '20' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_SSN = TRIM(B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN)) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS delYn FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY ) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM IS NULL AND A.REQ_IN_DAY < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt} AND ROWNUM <= 10000
mapper.insert: /* transferMapper.insertMcpRequest */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, MANAGER_CODE, AGENT_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, RES_NO, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, PSTATE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, OPEN_NO, FILE01, FILE01_MASK, FAXYN, FAXNUM, SCAN_ID, ON_OFF_TYPE, RIP, OPEN_REQ_DATE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_ADDITION, SHOP_CD, APP_FORM_YN, REQ_IN_DAY, CONTRACT_NUM, ETC_SPECIAL, REQ_USIM_NAME, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, APP_FORM_XML_YN, SPC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, SHOP_USM_ID, MEMO, REC_YN, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, SO_CD, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_CD, SO_TRNS_AGRM_YN, CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, SHOP_NM, PROD_ID, CRET_ID, BANNER_CD, SNTY_COLOR_CD, SNTY_CAPAC_CD, PROD_TYPE, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, TRANSFER_DTTM, REAL_SHOP_NM, USIM_KINDS_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MANAGER_CODE, AGENT_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, RES_NO, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, PSTATE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, OPEN_NO, FILE01, FILE01_MASK, FAXYN, FAXNUM, SCAN_ID, ON_OFF_TYPE, RIP, OPEN_REQ_DATE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_ADDITION, SHOP_CD, APP_FORM_YN, REQ_IN_DAY, CONTRACT_NUM, ETC_SPECIAL, REQ_USIM_NAME, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, APP_FORM_XML_YN, SPC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, SHOP_USM_ID, MEMO, REC_YN, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, SO_CD, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_CD, SO_TRNS_AGRM_YN, CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, SHOP_NM, PROD_ID, CRET_ID, BANNER_CD, SNTY_COLOR_CD, SNTY_CAPAC_CD, PROD_TYPE, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, SYSDATE, REAL_SHOP_NM, USIM_KINDS_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestAgent */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, JRDCL_AGENT_NAME, JRDCL_AGENT_RRN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN, SYS_RDATE, MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, JRDCL_AGENT_NAME, JRDCL_AGENT_RRN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN, SYS_RDATE, MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestChange */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_CAN ( NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, REQUEST_KEY, SYS_RDATE ) SELECT NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, REQUEST_KEY, SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestCstmr */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME, CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, CSTMR_TEL_FN, CSTMR_TEL_MN, CSTMR_TEL_RN, CSTMR_MOBILE_FN, CSTMR_MOBILE_MN, CSTMR_MOBILE_RN, CSTMR_POST, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_DTL, CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG, CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM, SYS_RDATE, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, SELF_CERT_TYPE, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, SELF_ISSU_NUM, CSTMR_JEJU_ID, SELF_CSTMR_CI, RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD, RECOMMEND_INFO ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME, CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, CSTMR_TEL_FN, CSTMR_TEL_MN, CSTMR_TEL_RN, CSTMR_MOBILE_FN, CSTMR_MOBILE_MN, CSTMR_MOBILE_RN, CSTMR_POST, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_DTL, CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG, CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM, SYS_RDATE, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, SELF_CERT_TYPE, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, SELF_ISSU_NUM, CSTMR_JEJU_ID, SELF_CSTMR_CI, RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD, RECOMMEND_INFO FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestDlvry */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_MOBILE_FN, DLVRY_MOBILE_MN, DLVRY_MOBILE_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_ADDR_BJD, DLVRY_MEMO, SYS_RDATE, TB_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_MOBILE_FN, DLVRY_MOBILE_MN, DLVRY_MOBILE_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_ADDR_BJD, DLVRY_MEMO, SYS_RDATE, TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestMove */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_MOBILE_MN, MOVE_MOBILE_RN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, SYS_RDATE, REQ_GUIDE_FLAG, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, REQ_GUIDE_MN ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_MOBILE_MN, MOVE_MOBILE_RN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, SYS_RDATE, REQ_GUIDE_FLAG, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, REQ_GUIDE_MN FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestPayment */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_AC_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, SYS_RDATE ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, REQ_AC_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestReq */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_NAME, REQ_CARD_RRN, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_NAME, REQ_CARD_RRN, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestSaleinfo */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_CAN ( MODEL_ID, REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_MONTHLY, MODEL_INSTALLMENT, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, MODEL_PRICE_VAT, RECYCLE_YN, MODEL_DISCOUNT1, MODEL_DISCOUNT2, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, SOC_CODE, USIM_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE, USIM_PRICE, MODEL_PRICE, ADDTION_SERVICE, ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM, MODEL_DISCOUNT3, USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, REAL_MDL_INSTAMT, SPRT_TP, MAX_DISCOUNT3, DC_AMT, ADD_DC_AMT, SETTL_WAY_CD, SETTL_AMT, SETTL_APV_NO, SETTL_TRA_NO, OWN_PERSONAL_CODE, RENTAL_BASE_AMT, RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT, RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT ) SELECT MODEL_ID, REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_MONTHLY, MODEL_INSTALLMENT, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, MODEL_PRICE_VAT, RECYCLE_YN, MODEL_DISCOUNT1, MODEL_DISCOUNT2, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, SOC_CODE, USIM_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE, USIM_PRICE, MODEL_PRICE, ADDTION_SERVICE, ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM, MODEL_DISCOUNT3, USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, REAL_MDL_INSTAMT, SPRT_TP, MAX_DISCOUNT3, DC_AMT, ADD_DC_AMT, SETTL_WAY_CD, SETTL_AMT, SETTL_APV_NO, SETTL_TRA_NO, OWN_PERSONAL_CODE, RENTAL_BASE_AMT, RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT, RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT FROM MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* transferMapper.insertMcpRequestState */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_STATE_KEY, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, OPEN_NO, MEMO, SYS_RDATE, RIP, RID, VIEW_FLAG, RES_NO, REQUEST_KEY, TB_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_STATE_KEY, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, OPEN_NO, MEMO, SYS_RDATE, RIP, RID, VIEW_FLAG, RES_NO, REQUEST_KEY, TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
DELETE FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /* transferMapper.insertEmvScanMst */ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_CAN ( SCAN_ID, WORK_ID, AGENCY_ID, COMPANY_ID, CUST_NM, C_MEMO, SCAN_FILE_CNT, DOC_TITLE, DOC_STATUS, DEL_REASON, USE_YN, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, ONLINE_YN, PROC_PRSN_ID, PROC_DTTM, PROC_STAT_CD ) SELECT SCAN_ID, WORK_ID, AGENCY_ID, COMPANY_ID, CUST_NM, C_MEMO, SCAN_FILE_CNT, DOC_TITLE, DOC_STATUS, DEL_REASON, USE_YN, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, ONLINE_YN, PROC_PRSN_ID, PROC_DTTM, PROC_STAT_CD FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP A WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_CAN WHERE SCAN_ID = A.SCAN_ID )

/* transferMapper.insertEmvScanFile */ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_CAN ( FILE_ID, SCAN_ID, FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, USE_YN, ORIGIN_DIR, SAVE_DIR, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, BANK_CD, BANK_CD_NO, CONTRACT_NUM ) SELECT FILE_ID, SCAN_ID, FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, USE_YN, ORIGIN_DIR, SAVE_DIR, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, BANK_CD, BANK_CD_NO, CONTRACT_NUM FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP A WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_CAN WHERE SCAN_ID = A.SCAN_ID )
mapper.delete: /* transferMapper.deleteEmvScanMst */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
/* transferMapper.deleteEmvScanFile */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
/* transferMapper.deleteMspScanMst */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_MST WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
/* transferMapper.deleteMspScanFile */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
/* transferMapper.deleteCanScanMst */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_CAN WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
/* transferMapper.deleteCanScanFile */ DELETE FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_CAN WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
mapper.select:
/* transferMapper.getTmntCntrList */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM as contractNum , A.CUSTOMER_ID as customerId , A.BAN as ban , A.SVC_CNTR_NO as svcCntrNo FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt} AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = A.CUSTOMER_ID AND CONTRACT_NUM <> A.CONTRACT_NUM AND (SUB_STATUS <> 'C' OR (SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') > SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}))) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_CAN WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) /* 이미 이관된 정보 제외 */ AND ROWNUM <= 1000

/* transferMapper.getUnpayAmtCheck */ SELECT A.BILL_YM as billYm , A.UNPAY_AMNT as unpayAmnt , A.EQIST_PYMN_AMNT as equistPymnAmnt , ( SELECT MAX(INST_ORGIN_AMNT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND MODEL_CHN_CD IN ('39', '01') AND NVL(INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) > 0 GROUP BY GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO ) AS instOrignAmnt FROM ( SELECT SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'INV', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /* 청구 */ , 'ADJ', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1 /* 조정 */ , 'ADJR', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /* 조정취소 */ , 'PYM', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1 /* 수납 */ , 'BCK', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /* 수납취소 */ , 'RFNR', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1 /* 환불취소 */ , 'RFN', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /* 환불 */ , 'FNTT', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) * -1 /* 자금이전 */ , 'FNTF', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /* 자금이전취소 */ )) AS UNPAY_AMNT , MAX(BILL_YM) AS BILL_YM , SUM(CASE WHEN A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ('EQIST','EQISV') AND PYMN_CD IN ('PYM', 'ADJ') THEN PYMN_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS EQIST_PYMN_AMNT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A WHERE A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} ) A
mapper.insert: /* transferMapper.insertMspRequest */ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, CONTRACT_NUM, SCAN_ID, RES_NO, AGENT_CODE, MANAGER_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, PSTATE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, OPEN_NO, FILE01, FILE01_MASK, FAXYN, FAXNUM, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_ADDITION, ON_OFF_TYPE, SHOP_CD, RIP, SYS_RDATE, APP_FORM_YN, REQ_IN_DAY, APP_FORM_XML_YN, OPEN_REQ_DATE, ETC_SPECIAL, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, REQ_USIM_NAME, SPC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, SHOP_USM_ID, MEMO, REC_YN, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, SO_CD, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_CD, CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, SHOP_NM, PROD_ID, CRET_ID, BANNER_CD, SNTY_COLOR_CD, SNTY_CAPAC_CD, PROD_TYPE, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, TRANSFER_DTTM, REAL_SHOP_NM, USIM_KINDS_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, CONTRACT_NUM, SCAN_ID, RES_NO, AGENT_CODE, MANAGER_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, PSTATE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, OPEN_NO, FILE01, FILE01_MASK, FAXYN, FAXNUM, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_ADDITION, ON_OFF_TYPE, SHOP_CD, RIP, SYS_RDATE, APP_FORM_YN, REQ_IN_DAY, APP_FORM_XML_YN, OPEN_REQ_DATE, ETC_SPECIAL, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, REQ_USIM_NAME, SPC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, SHOP_USM_ID, MEMO, REC_YN, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, SO_CD, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_CD, CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, SHOP_NM, PROD_ID, CRET_ID, BANNER_CD, SNTY_COLOR_CD, SNTY_CAPAC_CD, PROD_TYPE, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, mapper.update: /* tranferMapper.updateMspRequestAgent */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_AGENT SET MINOR_AGENT_NAME = CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(MINOR_AGENT_NAME, 1, LENGTH(MINOR_AGENT_NAME) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , MINOR_AGENT_RRN = CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(MINOR_AGENT_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN), '*') ELSE '' END , JRDCL_AGENT_NAME = CASE WHEN JRDCL_AGENT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(JRDCL_AGENT_NAME, 1, LENGTH(JRDCL_AGENT_NAME) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , JRDCL_AGENT_RRN = CASE WHEN JRDCL_AGENT_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JRDCL_AGENT_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN), '*') ELSE '' END , ENTRUST_REQ_NM = CASE WHEN ENTRUST_REQ_NM IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(ENTRUST_REQ_NM, 1, LENGTH(ENTRUST_REQ_NM) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , ENTRUST_RES_NM = CASE WHEN ENTRUST_RES_NM IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(ENTRUST_RES_NM, 1, LENGTH(ENTRUST_RES_NM) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , ENTRUST_RES_RRN = CASE WHEN ENTRUST_RES_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(ENTRUST_RES_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN), '*') ELSE '' END WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* tranferMapper.updateMspRequestCstmr */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR SET CSTMR_NAME = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME = CASE WHEN CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME, 1, LENGTH(CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME = CASE WHEN CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME, 1, LENGTH(CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, 1, 7) || '******' ELSE '' END , CSTMR_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(CSTMR_TEL_MN), '*') ELSE '' END , CSTMR_MOBILE_MN = CASE WHEN CSTMR_MOBILE_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(CSTMR_MOBILE_MN), '*') ELSE '' END , CSTMR_ADDR_DTL = CASE WHEN CSTMR_ADDR_DTL IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(CSTMR_ADDR_DTL), '*') ELSE '' END , CSTMR_MAIL = CASE WHEN CSTMR_MAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(CSTMR_MAIL, 1, INSTR(CSTMR_MAIL, '@') - 3) || LPAD('*', INSTR(CSTMR_MAIL, '@') - LENGTH(SUBSTR(CSTMR_MAIL, 1, INSTR(CSTMR_MAIL, '@') - 3)), '*') || SUBSTR(CSTMR_MAIL, INSTR(CSTMR_MAIL, '@')) ELSE '' END , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM = CASE WHEN CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM), '*') ELSE '' END , OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM = CASE WHEN OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, 1, LENGTH(OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN = CASE WHEN OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM = CASE WHEN OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, 1, LENGTH(OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* tranferMapper.updateMspRequestDlvry */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY SET DLVRY_NAME = CASE WHEN DLVRY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , DLVRY_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(DLVRY_TEL_MN), '*') ELSE '' END , DLVRY_MOBILE_MN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_MOBILE_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(DLVRY_MOBILE_MN), '*') ELSE '' END , DLVRY_ADDR_DTL = CASE WHEN DLVRY_ADDR_DTL IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(DLVRY_ADDR_DTL), '*') ELSE '' END WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* tranferMapper.updateMspRequestReq */ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_REQ SET REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME = CASE WHEN REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN = CASE WHEN REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = CASE WHEN REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER), -4) || '****') ELSE '' END , REQ_CARD_NAME = CASE WHEN REQ_CARD_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(REQ_CARD_NAME, 1, LENGTH(REQ_CARD_NAME) - 1) || '*' ELSE '' END , REQ_CARD_RRN = CASE WHEN REQ_CARD_RRN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(REQ_CARD_RRN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , REQ_CARD_NO = CASE WHEN REQ_CARD_NO IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(REQ_CARD_NO), -4) || '****') ELSE '' END , REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN), '*') ELSE '' END WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/* tranferMapper.updateMspJuoSubInfo */ UPDATE MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SET USER_SSN = CASE WHEN USER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN = CASE WHEN SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN IS NOT NULL THEN LPAD('*', LENGTH(SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN), '*') ELSE '' END , SUB_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN SUB_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , TRNS_YN = 'Y' WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/* transferMapper.deleteCommDatPrvTxn */
DELETE FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN WHERE APY_DT < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}

/* transferMapper.deleteInvstReqMst */
DELETE FROM MSP_INVST_REQ_MST WHERE TO_DATE(PROC_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}
